name: Shanghai Guangdian Electric Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Guangdian Electric Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electrical equipment in China. It provides switchgears; voltage core components, such as voltage circuit breakers and intelligent control terminal series; solar grid connection devices; and high-voltage frequency converter devices. The company offers its products under the SGEG, GE, AE, Honeywell, and AEG brands. Shanghai Guangdian Electric Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
